ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Reference to the training data used */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Specific architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the training data */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test data */,
  "model_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics (e.g., precision, recall, F1-score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "sample_idx" INTEGER /* Index of the sample in the dataset */,
  "real_label" INTEGER /* Actual label of the sample */,
  "pred_label" INTEGER /* Predicted label by the model */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance between the predicted and actual labels */,
  "min_anomaly_score" REAL /* Minimum anomaly score calculated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "is_anomaly" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the prediction is considered an anomaly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drifts" (
  "drift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drift */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that detected the drift */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drift was detected */,
  "drift_type" TEXT /* Type of drift detected (e.g., concept drift, data drift) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drift */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model when the drift was detected */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the drift on the model's performance */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the drift was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the drift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drifts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drifts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that detected the anomaly */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., data anomaly, prediction anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model when the anomaly was detected */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the anomaly on the model's performance */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the anomaly was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  "version_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the revision */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the revision is active */,
  "revision_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
